title: vriesea notata
intro: Vriesea notata, also known as the 'Silver Vase' or 'Notata Air Plant', is a type of epiphytic bromeliad plant that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Vriesea notata include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the digestion of food. In terms of herbal preparations, Vriesea notata is typically consumed as a tea or used in tinctures, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts of the plant.
